top3.sql:
SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA BETWEEN 0.7 AND 4.0 -- assuming normal range for IgA is 0.7-4.0 g/L based on typical reference values
ORDER BY l.IGA DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA IS NOT NULL
  AND l.IGA BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(IGA) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGA IS NOT NULL) 
                AND (SELECT MAX(IGA) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGA IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY l.IGA DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA BETWEEN 0.7 AND 4.0 -- assuming normal range for IgA is 0.7-4.0 g/L based on typical reference values
ORDER BY l.IGA DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA IS NOT NULL
  AND l.IGA BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(IGA) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGA IS NOT NULL) 
                AND (SELECT MAX(IGA) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGA IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY l.IGA DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA >= 0.7 AND l.IGA <= 4.0
ORDER BY l.IGA DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA BETWEEN 0.7 AND 4.0 -- assuming normal range for IgA is 0.7-4.0 g/L based on typical reference values
ORDER BY l.IGA DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA IS NOT NULL
  AND l.IGA BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(IGA) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGA IS NOT NULL) 
                AND (SELECT MAX(IGA) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGA IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY l.IGA DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA IS NOT NULL
  AND l.IGA = (
    SELECT MAX(IGA) 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE IGA IS NOT NULL 
      AND IGA <= (SELECT IGG FROM Laboratory WHERE IGG IS NOT NULL ORDER BY IGG DESC LIMIT 1)
  )
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.IGA BETWEEN 0.7 AND 4.0 -- assuming normal range for IgA is 0.7-4.0 g/L based on typical reference values
ORDER BY l.IGA DESC
LIMIT 1;
